description: NEXUS-6 망원경 렌즈 레지스트리 — 1580 등록 (LENS-P2-5 +146: A=12 bio / B=13 chem / C=98 cross_domain(+earth_science,+economics) / D=11 drift_correction / E=12 n6_variants) | LENS-P3-1 autoprune: -4 (threshold<0.6)

lenses.name: cross_ocean_network

lenses.name: tidal_energy

lenses.description: 음향 메타물질 렌즈 — 밴드갭, 음향 차폐, 메타물질 구조 설계 분석

lenses.name: circadian_rhythm

lenses.name: bt_hexa_execution_backends

lenses.name: bt_hexa_optimization_passes

lenses.description: Backends × OptPasses = n^2 = 36 — n×n 그리드 정합성

lenses.description: Triple Coincidence = 3 — granularity quantum 3-way 일치 검출

lenses.name: bt_hexa_primitives

lenses.name: bt_hexa_type_layers

lenses.name: bt_hexa_expr_stmt_diff

lenses.name: bt_hexa_hexatype_backends

lenses.name: bt_hexa_total_lines_mu

lenses.name: bt_hexa_module_square

lenses.name: bt_hexa_factorial_minus_one

lenses.name: bt_hexa_keywords_t10

lenses.name: bt_hexa_operator_square

lenses.name: bt_hexa_std_modules

lenses.name: bt_hexa_keyword_distribution

lenses.name: qcoh_l1_norm
lenses.description: quantum coherence — Baumgratz-Cramer-Plenio l1-norm C_l1 = sum_{i!=j} |rho_ij|

lenses.name: qcoh_rel_entropy
lenses.description: quantum coherence — relative entropy C_rel = S(rho_diag) - S(rho)

lenses.name: qcoh_tsallis2
lenses.description: quantum coherence — Tsallis-α=2 C_T2 = 1 - sum p_i^2

lenses.name: qcoh_robustness
lenses.description: quantum coherence — robustness lower bound C_l1/(d-1)

lenses.name: qcoh_fisher_info
lenses.description: quantum coherence — quantum Fisher information F_Q = 4 Var(H)

lenses.name: qcoh_linear_entropy
lenses.description: quantum coherence — linear entropy S_L = 1 - Tr(rho_diag^2)

lenses.name: qcoh_number
lenses.description: quantum coherence — coherence number |{i : p_i > eps}| (Schmidt rank analog)

lenses.name: qcoh_geometric
lenses.description: quantum coherence — geometric coherence C_g = 1 - max_i p_i

lenses.name: qcoh_skew_info
lenses.description: quantum coherence — Wigner-Yanase skew information I(rho,K) = Var(K) on pure real amps

lenses.name: qcoh_asymmetry
lenses.description: quantum coherence — asymmetry imbalance |P(lo) - P(hi)| across probability halves

lenses.name: qcoh_renyi2
lenses.description: quantum coherence — Renyi-2 entropy C_R2 = -ln(sum p_i^2) = -ln(purity)

lenses.name: qcoh_min_entropy
lenses.description: quantum coherence — min-entropy H_min = -ln(max p_i)

lenses.name: qcoh_participation
lenses.description: quantum coherence — inverse participation ratio PR = 1/sum p_i^2 (effective dimension)

lenses.name: qcoh_log_l1
lenses.description: quantum coherence — log-bounded l1-norm C_log_l1 = log_2(1 + C_l1)

lenses.name: qcoh_renyi_half
lenses.description: quantum coherence — Renyi-1/2 entropy H_{1/2} = 2 ln(sum sqrt p_i) (long-tail sensitive)

lenses.name: qcoh_peak_ratio
lenses.description: quantum coherence — peak ratio p_(2)/p_(1) (Bell/GHZ -> 1; near-peaked -> small)
